backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the MEDANTA CARE backend, defining data types (Product, Order, UserProfile, BlogPost, etc.) and including storage/authorization mixins for a pharmacy e-commerce platform.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the WhatsAppButton component's href was updated to link to WhatsApp number +91 8429145707 with a pre-filled order message.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to short summaries describing each component or page's purpose and any notable recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme design tokens (colors, radius, chart colors, sidebar).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'MEDANTA CARE' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app file that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps them in a layout with Navbar, Footer, WhatsAppButton, ChatbotWidget, and a conditional ProfileSetupModal.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied UI component shown when a non-admin user attempts to access the admin dashboard, with a link back to the homepage.
frontend/src/components/AddressFormModal: Dialog modal for adding or editing a user delivery address, with form validation and mutations for both create and update operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogFormMo: Admin modal form for creating or editing a blog post, supporting title, content, category, author, cover image upload, and optional publish-on-save. Uses create/update/publish mutations.
frontend/src/components/admin/BlogManage: Admin section that lists all blog posts in a table with options to create, edit, delete, publish, or unpublish each post using a modal form.
frontend/src/components/admin/OrderManag: Admin section displaying all orders in an expandable list with status badges, order details, and a dropdown to update each order's fulfillment status.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductFor: A modal dialog form for creating or editing a product, with fields for name, description, price, category, prescription requirement, stock status, and image URL, using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/admin/ProductMan: Admin section that displays a searchable, paginated table of all products with options to add, edit, or delete each product via a modal and mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/BlogCard.tsx: Card component for displaying a blog post preview with cover image, category badge, title, excerpt, author, and date.
frontend/src/components/CategoryGrid.tsx: Renders a responsive grid of medicine category cards, each linking to the catalog page filtered by that category, using icons and labels from categoryUtils.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: A floating chatbot widget with a toggle button that displays a chat panel with predefined FAQ quick-reply buttons and a scrollable message history.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, social media links, quick navigation links, legal policy links, and contact details for MEDANTA CARE.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Hero banner section for the homepage featuring a headline, CTA buttons for ordering and uploading prescriptions, trust badges, and a hero image with floating stat cards.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with logo, desktop search form, nav links, cart icon with item count, and a user menu supporting login/logout and admin access.
frontend/src/components/OrderProgressTra: Displays a visual order status tracker with horizontal (desktop) and vertical (mobile) layouts, highlighting completed, current, and pending stages across five order statuses.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, category badge, name, description, price, and an add-to-cart button. Links to the product detail page and handles out-of-stock and prescription-required states.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name, email, and phone number to complete their profile. Validates inputs and submits via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/TestimonialSlide: Auto-advancing testimonial carousel displaying customer reviews with star ratings, quotes, and author info. Supports manual prev/next navigation and dot indicators.
frontend/src/components/WhatsAppButton.t: Fixed floating WhatsApp button that opens a pre-filled WhatsApp chat link to the MEDANTA CARE phone number.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Custom hook that wraps Internet Identity login/logout logic, exposing authentication state, principal ID, and a logout function that also clears the React Query cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useCart.ts: Custom hook managing a global shopping cart with localStorage persistence, exposing add, remove, update quantity, clear, and total/count helpers via a module-level event system.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing DFINITY AuthClient-based login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering CRUD operations for products, orders, user profiles, blog posts, and related entities with cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Inter and Poppins fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines MEDANTA CARE brand color tokens (OKLCH) for light and dark modes along with utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/categoryUtils.ts: Utility module that maps MedicineCategory enum values to display labels, icons, and Tailwind color classes, and exports helper functions for formatting prices, dates, and order statuses.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page that checks authentication and admin status, then renders tabbed sections for managing orders, products, and blog posts.
frontend/src/pages/BlogListingPage.tsx: Blog listing page that displays published blog posts in a grid with category filter buttons, showing skeletons while loading and an empty state when no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostPage.tsx: Individual blog post page that fetches and renders a post by ID with cover image, metadata, content, and social share links, with loading skeletons and a not-found state.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page that lists cart items with quantity controls and removal options, shows an order summary with total, and navigates to checkout.
frontend/src/pages/CatalogPage.tsx: Displays a medicine catalog page with search, category filtering via a sidebar, and a product grid. Uses React Query hooks to fetch all products, search results, or category-filtered products depending on user input.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutPage.tsx: Multi-step checkout flow (address, prescription, payment, confirmation) for authenticated users. Handles address selection/creation, optional prescription upload, payment method selection, and order placement.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerDashboard.tsx: Customer dashboard with tabbed views for order history, saved addresses, and prescriptions. Supports expanding order details, managing addresses via a modal, and displays order progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Marketing-focused home page composed of sections including a hero, 'Why Choose Us' feature cards, category grid, price advantage comparison, and a testimonial slider.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page that authenticates users via Internet Identity, showing benefit highlights and redirecting already-authenticated users to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/OrderTrackingPage.tsx: Order tracking page that fetches and displays a specific order's status, progress tracker, item details, delivery address, and payment info. Requires authentication and handles loading/not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: React page component that displays full product details (image, price, stock, prescription badge) fetched by ID, with quantity selector and add-to-cart functionality including a brief confirmation state.
frontend/src/pages/StaticPage.tsx: Generic static content page component that renders predefined section-based content (About Us, Contact Us, Terms, Privacy Policy, Refund Policy) based on a title prop passed in.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining MEDANTA CARE brand colors (navy, orange, purple), custom fonts (Inter/Poppins), extended shadows, border radii, and keyframe animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state snapshot (version 7) describing the MEDANTA CARE e-pharmacy platform's architecture, brand identity, implemented features, known issues, and key configuration details like contact/WhatsApp numbers.
